title: EvidenceProfileMeta
description: Meta-schema for evidence profile files (profiles/evidence-profiles/*.json). Defines the validation rules and configuration for a single evidence type.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI — should reference this meta-schema.

evidenceType.description: The EvidenceType enum value this profile governs.

version.description: Semantic version of this profile definition.

description.description: Human-readable description of this profile and its regulatory context.

piiLevel.description: Data sensitivity classification for documents of this type.

maxAgeInDays.description: Maximum acceptable age of the document in days. Null means no age restriction.

acceptedMimeTypes.description: MIME types accepted for this evidence type.

maxFileSizeBytes.description: Maximum permitted file size in bytes.

rules.description: Ordered list of validation rules applied during ingestion.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the rule checks.

severity.description: REJECT: failure causes document rejection. WARN: advisory only. INFO: informational.

automated.description: True if the rule is checked automatically by the ingestion service; false if adviser must assert compliance.

retentionPolicyYears.description: Minimum retention period in years under FCA record-keeping rules.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was first published.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update to this profile.
